token.validateHint: Check if your API key is valid and see your account status.
token.configureAccessDesc: Configure a local provider or enter a compatible API key to use the AI features.

connect.hint: Sign in with your Patreon account to automatically set up your API key. No copy-paste needed.
connect.popupBlocked: Popup was blocked. Please allow popups for this site and try again.
connect.openerBlocked: Your browser blocked communication with the login window. Disable popup isolation/noopener for this site or copy your API key manually.
connect.noTokenReceived: No API key was returned from the login window. Your browser may be blocking popup communication; copy your API key manually or allow popups for this site.
connect.success: Connected! Your API key has been saved.
connect.savedButUnverified: API key saved but could not be verified. Please check your connection.
connect.failed: Connection failed. The popup was closed before completing.

config.apiAccessHint: Configure a user-controlled provider endpoint and client-scoped API keys.

config.generalSettingsHint: Configure general behavior and file paths for BoobaStudio.

mask.hint: Mark the area that should be changed in the main image.
mask.hintSecondary: Make the selection a bit larger than needed so the AI has room to work.

wallDetection.title: Auto-Detect Walls
wallDetection.description: Automatically detect wall segments from your scene and create Foundry walls.

hatchingRemoval.title: Hatching Removal
hatchingRemoval.hint: Removes thin diagonal lines (cross-hatching) from maps before detection. Set the color and maximum width of lines to remove.

hint.blurKernel: Reduce noise before detection. Higher values = smoother but may lose fine details. (1-21)
hint.closeKernel: Connect nearby edges. Useful for dashed or broken wall lines. (1-15)
hint.canny1: Lower threshold for edge detection. Lower values detect more edges, including faint ones. (0-255)
hint.canny2: Upper threshold for edge detection. Higher values filter out weak/noisy edges. (0-255)
hint.minContourArea: Ignore detected shapes smaller than this pixel area. Filters out small noise. (0-5000)
hint.minContourAreaPercent: Ignore shapes smaller than this percentage of total image area. Better for different image sizes. (0.001-5%)
hint.minSegmentLength: Ignore wall segments shorter than this pixel length. (0-100)
hint.closeIterations: Number of morphological close passes. Higher values connect more gaps. (0-5)
hint.approxEpsilon: Polygon simplification tolerance. Higher values create simpler walls. (0.5-10)
hint.edgeMargin: Ignore pixels near the image edges. Prevents detecting frame borders. (0-50 pixels)
hint.mergeContours: Combine nearby detected contours into single shapes. Reduces fragmentation.
hint.colorDetection: Use color matching instead of edge detection. Best for maps with solid-colored walls.
hint.colorThreshold: How closely colors must match. Higher = more lenient matching. (0-100)
hint.removeHatching: Removes thin diagonal lines (cross-hatching) before detection. Common in old-school maps.
hint.hatchingColor: The color of hatching lines to remove. Use the color picker to match your map.
hint.hatchingThreshold: How closely a pixel color must match the hatching color (0-50). Lower = stricter matching.
hint.hatchingMaxWidth: Maximum width of lines to remove in pixels. Thicker lines (walls) are kept. (1-10)
hint.useTexture: Use the raw background image. Disable to use a rendered snapshot of the scene with all tiles merged.
hint.enableDownscaling: Automatically resize large images for faster processing. May miss fine details on very large maps.
hint.livePreview: Automatically re-run detection when any parameter changes. Can be slow on large images.

imageSource.title: Image Source
imageSource.textureHint: Uses the raw background image directly.
imageSource.thumbnailHint: Uses merged/flattened scene layers. Best for maps with multiple tiles.
imageSource.downscalingHint: Faster processing but may miss fine details. Recommended for large images.

wallTypes.title: Wall Type
wallTypes.brushHint: Click on detected segments to change their wall type.

tools.title: Tools
tools.selectHint: Click to select segments. Shift+click to add to selection.
tools.eraseHint: Click on segments to remove them from detection.
tools.brushHint: Click on segments to change their wall type.
tools.selectAreaHint: Draw rectangles to limit detection to specific areas.

colorDetection.title: Color Detection
colorDetection.enableHint: Detect walls by color instead of edges. Best for maps with distinct wall colors.
colorDetection.pickColorHint: Click on the scene to pick a color.
colorDetection.pickFromSceneHint: Click on the canvas to sample a color.
colorDetection.pickingMode: Click on scene to pick color...
colorDetection.pickFailed: Failed to pick color from scene
colorDetection.thresholdHint: How closely colors must match. Higher = more lenient. (0-100)

presets.title: Presets
presets.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the preset "{name}"?
presets.name: Preset Name

sceneManagement.title: Scene Walls
sceneManagement.confirmRemoveAll: Are you sure you want to remove ALL {count} wall(s) from this scene? This cannot be undone.
sceneManagement.noWallsToRemove: No walls in this scene to remove.

maxWalls.title: Wall Limit Warning
maxWalls.warning: The detection found {detected} wall segments, which exceeds the configured maximum of {max}. Creating this many walls may impact scene performance. Do you want to proceed?

maxWalls.name: Maximum Walls per Detection
maxWalls.hint: Maximum number of walls that can be created in one detection operation. A confirmation dialog will be shown if the detected count exceeds this limit.

status.pickingColor: Click on the preview to pick a color…

wallDetection.errorNoBackground: This scene has no background image.
wallDetection.errorImageLoad: Failed to load scene background image.
wallDetection.errorTimeout: Wall detection timed out. Try reducing scene resolution or adjusting settings.

alternatemode.editPrompt: Edit the current image with a text prompt. Describe what should change and the AI will apply it.
alternatemode.google/nano-banana: Edit the current image and add style, structure, or anything else from other images.
alternatemode.google/nano-banana-2: Edit the current image and add style, structure, or anything else from other images.
alternatemode.google/nano-banana-pro: Higher quality editing — modify the current image with references and more detail.
alternatemode.stability-ai/relight: Replace the background and lighting of the image.
alternatemode.sketch: Create a completely new image based on a sketch or a template that is digitally processed.
alternatemode.structure: Use the layout and the composition to generate a new image with different content.
alternatemode.style: Imitate the color choice and drawing style to generate an image that matches the template.
alternatemode.outpaint: Enlarge the image by extending the border area.
alternatemode.searchAndReplace: Describe what you are looking for and replace the element with a new one.
alternatemode.searchAndRecolor: Describe what you are looking for and replace the color of the element with another.
alternatemode.inpaint: Select an area with a mask and replace it with something new.
alternatemode.erase: Select an area with a mask and remove it.
alternatemode.title: Image to image conversion
alternatemode.description: With this tool, you can generate a variant of an image. Make sure the description is precise. It uses the currently selected image as a basis.

AiTranslator.skipEmbedsHint: Do not translate items and abilities that the actor has.
AiTranslator.dictionaryDescr: When translating actors, items are automatically pulled from the dictionary. This saves you time and mana and provides a consistent translation.
AiTranslator.batchModeLock: Compendiums can only be processed in batch mode.
AiTranslator.useFallbackHint: Copies the untranslated source to the target if the translation fails.
AiTranslator.addToDictionaryHint: Add the translation to the dictionary to reuse it later. When translating actors, items are automatically pulled from the dictionary. This saves you time and mana and provides a consistent translation.
AiTranslator.overwritehint: Overwrite existing items if they already exist and only add the missing items.
AiTranslator.getHelp: Contact BoobaStudio if you have issues with translations in specific systems.
AiTranslator.queueing: Items are queued ({current}/{count}). Please wait until the process is complete.
AiTranslator.addMatcherHint: Enter the item name in the source language (Name) and the UUID of the corresponding item in the target language (Uuid). When translating actors, matching items are automatically pulled from the dictionary.
AiTranslator.folderouthint: Select the folder where the translation should be saved.
AiTranslator.packageouthint: Select the compendium where the translation should be saved (only unlocked compendiums).
AiTranslator.title: Translation
AiTranslator.description: Automatically translate this object into the language you want.
AiTranslator.waitSomeTime: This process can take a few minutes. Please be patient :-)
AiTranslator.languagehint: The target language into which the object should be translated.

AiThread.max_messages_hint: If the number of messages in this thread exceeds this value, the oldest message will be deleted. This happens automatically. Chat GPT also has a maximum number of messages that it can process.
AiThread.enable_assistant_hint: The assistant tries to tailor the responses to fit the game system and behaves more appropriately for role-playing games. Disable the assistant if you wish to use the model's base behavior.
AiThread.max_history_hint: The maximum number of previous messages sent with the current request as context. A larger number incurs higher costs but can yield better results. This model has no automatic history (only GPT).

example.1: Let the ideas for an adventure be generated. Or improve your own ideas.
example.2: Let general questions be answered: How much does a detective earn in the 1920s? How does a catapult work?
example.3:
Let Chat GPT portray a character.

Prompt: You are Cebula, the onion farmer. Your story is <<...>> behave accordingly.
example.4:
Upload PDFs and let the rules be explained or summarize adventures.

Ask specifically about content or let it be summarized in a certain way.
example.5: Generate descriptions for places, events, characters, items or actions.
example.6: Have your adventure notes summarized or formulate the story of your adventures from them.
example.7: You can create threads as pages in any journal to structure your topics. Threads retain their history.
example.8: Drag and drop items, actors, or other documents onto a thread to reference the data (e.g., You are character XY prompts).

AiThread.title: Thread (GPT Chat)
AiThread.explanation: A thread is a conversation with Chat GTP that remains between sessions (inactive for a maximum of 60 days). Utilize all the capacities of the AI and receive answers to your questions and support for your creativity.
AiThread.editNotSupported: Editing messages is not supported for GPT threads.
AiThread.deleteLocalOnly: This removes the message locally only (server history can’t be changed).
AiThread.deleteThreadConfirm: This will delete the server-side GPT thread and clear local messages. Continue?

prosemirror.editing: Text is being edited, please wait...
prosemirror.editTextHint: Describe how you want to modify the selected text. The AI will rewrite it based on your instructions.
prosemirror.editTextPlaceholder: e.g. Make it more dramatic, Simplify the language, Add more detail...
prosemirror.selectTextFirst: Please select some text in the editor first.
prosemirror.generateTextHint: Describe what text should be generated and inserted at the current cursor position. You can control creativity and length.
prosemirror.generateTextPlaceholder: e.g. A mysterious tavern in a dark alley, run by a one-eyed dwarf...
prosemirror.narrationHint: Wrap the selected text in a narration box. This adds play and stop controls for text-to-speech playback, letting you read the content aloud as a narrator voice during your session.
prosemirror.narrationUsage: Select the text you want to narrate, then confirm. The narration box will appear in the journal with audio controls.
prosemirror.title: BoobaStudio

AiImageGen.placeholdertile:
Here are some points you should consider:
Type of tile: What does it show? (e.g., campfire, rug, statue)
Material and color: What is it made of and what colors does it have?
Size and shape: How big is it and what shape is it? (e.g., 1x1 square, round)
Details: Are there special features like shadows, wear, or embellishments?
Use: What is it used for on the battlemap? (e.g., cover, decoration, obstacle)
Example: "A round campfire tile with black coals and scorched ground. It fits on a square and serves as a night camp or light source."
AiImageGen.confirmMultiple:
You want to generate {variant} variants with each {count} copies.
This will consume approximately:

{mana} x

Do you want to continue?
AiImageGen.placeholderbattlemap:
Here are some points you should consider:
Location: Where does the scene take place? (e.g., forest, city, beach, space)
Time: At what time of day or year does the scene take place? (e.g., dawn, night, autumn)
Environment: What elements are visible in the scene? (e.g., trees, buildings, rivers, mountains)
Atmosphere: What mood should the scene convey? (e.g., calm, gloomy, mystical, vibrant)
People or characters: Are there characters in the scene? What do they look like and what are they doing?
Colors and lighting: What colors dominate the scene? How is the lighting? (e.g., warm sunlight, cold moonlight, colorful lights)
Example: "An abandoned, misty forest clearing at sunrise. In the background, dense, dark trees and a small stream can be seen. A deer stands in the middle of the clearing, in the soft, golden light of the rising sun. The mood is calm and mysterious."
AiImageGen.title: Image Generation
AiImageGen.description: Create an AI-generated image for this object. Be as precise as possible with the description.

Here are some points to consider:
Location: Where does the scene take place? (e.g. forest, city, beach, space)

People or characters: Are there characters in the scene? What do they look like and what are they doing?
Colors and light: What colors dominate the scene? How is the lighting? (e.g. warm sunlight, cold moonlight, colorful lights)
Example: "A deserted, misty forest clearing at sunrise. In the background, dense, dark trees and a small stream can be seen. A deer stands in the middle of the clearing, in the soft, golden light of the rising sun. The mood is calm and mysterious."

AiImageGen.placeholderjournal: Describe an image that would fit well here.
AiImageGen.placeholdercharacter:
Here are some points to consider:
Appearance: Skin color, hair color, hairstyle, eye color, facial features, body build
Clothing: Style (casual, formal, futuristic), colors, accessories (hat, glasses, jewelry)
Expression: Emotions (smiling, serious, thoughtful), posture, gaze direction
Example: "A young woman with long, blonde hair, blue-green eyes, and a friendly smile. She is wearing a red leather jacket."
AiImageGen.placeholderobject:
Here are some points to consider:
Type of object: What is it? (e.g. sword, book, watch, piece of jewelry)
Material: What material is it made of? (e.g. wood, metal, glass, leather)
Color and pattern: What colors and patterns does the object have?
Size and shape: How big is the object and what shape does it have?
Embellishments and details: Are there special embellishments, engravings, or decorations?
Use: What is the object used for? (e.g. decoration, tool, weapon)
Example: "An antique, silver pocket knife with an intricate, engraved floral pattern. It is small and compact, with a shiny blade and a smooth ebony handle. The knife is functional and can be used as a tool."
AiImageGen.placeholdersymbol:
Here are some points to consider:
Type of symbol: What does the symbol represent? (e.g. a heart, a star, a tree)
Shape: What basic shape does the symbol have? (e.g. round, square, abstract)
Colors: What colors should be used in the symbol?
Embellishments and details: Are there special details or patterns that the symbol should have?
Meaning: What symbolic meaning or message should the symbol convey?
Example: "A golden, minimalist heart symbol with slightly rounded corners. The heart is monochromatic and plain, without embellishments, to symbolize love and simplicity."
AiImageGen.descriptionImage: Generate a background image with BoobaStudio for this scene.
AiImageGen.autodownscaler: Do you want to automatically downscale the image (reduce resolution) and proceed? You can upscale the image again later.

vector.uploadToStore: Upload file to the Vector Store
vector.notForThisModel: This model does not support vector stores.
vector.uploadFile:
Add a text or PDF file to your Vector Store to use it in conversations and access it as part of a semantic search.

What does that mean?

The main advantage of a semantic search is that the system understands your question in context and can answer it based on existing information. This way, you can find content specifically without knowing the exact terms, get extensive matters explained easily, and even discuss complex strategies, mechanics, and behaviors with the AI.

How does it work?

The Vector Store is a personal cloud storage for your documents, created separately for each of your game worlds and directly connected to the journal integration of Cibola 8. When adding a document, all images are automatically removed, and the contents are available to you as a reference for your threads.

This feature requires a small amount of mana each month, depending on the file size and the number of vectors generated. Please ensure that you only upload content for which you have the necessary rights and observe the privacy policy of ChatGPT.
vector.selectFile: Select a text file (e.g., txt or pdf)
vector.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload a text file.
vector.uploadHint: Upload a text or PDF file to reference it later in threads.
vector.success: Upload successful. It may take a moment for the file to be processed.
vector.notAvailable: The Vector Store requires an active patron subscription for use. Upload text and PDF files to reference them later in threads.
vector.emptyHint: Upload documents to your game worlds to enable semantic search in AI threads.
vector.vectorListAll: An overview of all your Vector Stores. To save mana, you can delete anything you no longer need. Or check what you are still missing. All Vector Stores incur ongoing mana costs!
vector.headerDescription: Manage your document stores for semantic search in AI conversations.
vector.featureSearch: Find content without knowing exact terms
vector.manaNote: Vector Stores consume a small amount of mana monthly. Only upload content you have rights to use.

outpaint.prompt: Describe what should be added in the margins of the image.

fieldtooltips.resolution: A lower resolution is cheaper and in most cases enough, but can have artifacts. Higher resolutions cost more mana.
fieldtooltips.cref: Refer to the additional reference images in the order they were uploaded. The first image is the most important. Note: If you are using image-to-image, the first image is the source image.
fieldtooltips.background: Set the transparency of the background.
fieldtooltips.preserve_original_subject: How much the original image should be preserved in the new image. A high value preserves the original image, while a low value allows for greater changes.
fieldtooltips.original_background_depth: Controls how much the depth of the new background should correspond to the original image.
fieldtooltips.background_reference: Choose an image to serve as a reference for the new background. The background prompt will then be ignored.
fieldtooltips.disable_safety_checker: Disables the NSFW filter. Only available after consent on the homepage and for active Patreon supporters.
fieldtooltips.safety_tolerance: Specifies how tolerant the model should be towards NSFW content. A higher value leads to more NSFW content. Only available after consent on the homepage and for active Patreon supporters.
fieldtooltips.prompt_upsampling: The prompt is automatically modified for a more creative result.
fieldtooltips.num_interference_steps: Number of steps the model takes to generate the image. A higher value can lead to more creative results but also requires more time and mana.
fieldtooltips.raw: Generates less processed, naturally appearing images.
fieldtooltips.useSketch: Use the improvised sketch instead of the selected image as a base.
fieldtooltips.image-to-image: Create an image from text using the current image as a starting point.
fieldtooltips.strength: This parameter controls how much influence the existing image has on the new image. A value of 0 corresponds to the original image, a value of 1 would completely regenerate the image.
fieldtooltips.guidance: Determines how closely the model adheres to the prompt.
fieldtooltips.cfg: Determines how closely the model adheres to the prompt.
fieldtooltips.vivid: Vivid causes the model to lean towards generating hyper-real and dramatic images. Natural causes the model to produce more natural, less hyper-real looking images.
fieldtooltips.clean_audio: Reduce background noise and improve clarity.
fieldtooltips.megapixels: Higher values increase output resolution and mana cost.
fieldtooltips.similarity_boost: How closely the output should match the reference voice.
fieldtooltips.stability: Controls voice stability; higher values reduce variation.
fieldtooltips.style: Controls style strength; higher values sound more expressive.

fields.speechcontent: The text that should be converted to speech.
fields.mask: Highlight the area you want to edit.
fields.prompt: What do you want to change about the object? How should your new object look?
fields.negative_prompt: What do you not want to see in the image?

radialMenu.description: Customize the radial menu of Cibola. Drag and drop macros or documents into the menu for quick access.
radialMenu.headerDescription: Customize your radial menu with macros, documents, and custom sections.
radialMenu.dragMe: Drag onto the macro bar to use the menu
radialMenu.name: BoobaStudio Radial Menu
radialMenu.hint: The menu provides quick access to the main features of BoobaStudio.
radialMenu.tileTransformationHint: Select an area of the current scene, edit it in the image generator, and place it back on the canvas as a tile.
radialMenu.noActiveScene: No active scene. Navigate to a scene first.
radialMenu.tipDragDrop: Drag and drop macros or documents into sections
radialMenu.tipSections: Create sections to organize your shortcuts
radialMenu.tipCustomize: Add custom images and hide text labels
radialMenu.noItemsHint: Add sections or drag items from the sidebar

settings.welcomeHint: Open the welcome screen with an overview of Cibola 8 features and quick setup options.
settings.radialconfigHint: Configure the radial menu by adding your own functions.
settings.max_c8_historyHint: The maximum number of messages that should be saved in the chat history. This is important for the quality of responses but also affects the mana consumed (/c8 in chat).
settings.queueviewerHint: The queue shows you the current status of your long-running requests. You can also cancel them here.
settings.vectorstoreHint: Manage your Vector Stores. Vector Stores allow you to interact with text documents.
settings.AutoDownscaleHint: The resolution of images is automatically limited and reduced when saving. This saves storage space and improves performance.
settings.ActorPathHint: Generated actor images (portraits, tokens) will be saved in this folder.
settings.ItemPathHint: Generated item images will be saved in this folder.
settings.TilePathHint: Generated tile images will be saved in this folder.
settings.ScenePathHint: Generated scene and map images will be saved in this folder.
settings.SongPathHint: Generated music and audio files will be saved in this folder.
settings.SpeechPathHint: Generated speech and voice files will be saved in this folder.
settings.chatButtonHint: Show the chat button in the sidebar next to the chat window. Note: The button can also be dragged and dropped onto the macro bar.
settings.chatModelHint: Choose the language model that should be used for the direct request to the corresponding AI in the chat (start a message with /c8 in the chat).
settings.localizerHint: Translate GUI elements into your language.
settings.browserHint: Display all your generated content. These are stored in the 'storage' directory of this module.
settings.apikeyHint: Your API key for using the AI services. Keep this key secret and update it if you fear it has been compromised. You can find or regenerate your API key on the BoobaStudio website. Due to the nature of Foundry, the key can also be read by other modules and potentially misused.

settings.enabledHint: Enable client-only mode. Requires a per-session confirmation and a locally stored OpenAI API key.
settings.openaiKeyHint: Your provider API key is stored locally and sent only to the endpoint you configure.
settings.getOpenAIKey: Get your API key from platform.openai.com
settings.limitedWarning: Client-only mode uses the configured provider directly. Hosted gallery, packs, and vector services remain unavailable unless you configure compatible replacements.

clientOnly.title: Client-Only Mode
clientOnly.description: Use a user-configured provider instead of hosted credits for supported chat and image generation. Your key stays local.
clientOnly.warning: Client-only mode sends requests directly to the provider endpoint you configured. Enable for this session?
clientOnly.modelNotAllowed: Client-only OpenAI mode only supports ChatGPT 5 or higher.
clientOnly.imageRequiresTextPrompt: Client-only image generation requires a text prompt.

boobastudio.changelog: If you want to know more about new features, also check out the Changelog.

QueueViewer.title: Queue
QueueViewer.description: Monitor all ongoing and completed items in Cibola's permanent queue. Items will continue processing even when Foundry is closed and will resume automatically when you start the world.
QueueViewer.emptyHint: Translation jobs and other long-running tasks will appear here.

Localizer.batchmodeHint: The process is executed in batch mode, consuming only half the mana. However, it has a lower priority and can take up to 24 hours – usually, it's only 1–2 minutes. Deactivate this option for faster translations. For very large requests, batch mode is automatically activated.
Localizer.title: Localization
Localizer.modules: System and module language file translation
Localizer.warning: Please note that this may potentially affect the functionality of the modules.
Localizer.descriptionTranslations: Manage your additional language files. You can deactivate, delete, or edit them. All activated language files will automatically load for the corresponding language after restarting the world.
Localizer.description: Select translation files from modules and systems and convert them into a language of your choice. The localized language files can then be loaded automatically. These files are typically responsible for translating GUI elements.
Localizer.addLanguage: Add more languages. You can select these in the settings after a reload. However, make sure that all translations are complete, as otherwise the GUI may not be displayed correctly.
Localizer.selectFile: Choose a custom language file (*.json) and specify its language to load it automatically.
Localizer.missingItems: Please translate embedded items in advance so that they can be reused and do not have to be created for each actor again. Existing translations will be stored separately and can be referenced automatically. This saves you mana and ensures a consistent translation.

error.ApiConnectionSuccess: Connection to the configured provider successful.
error.nothingToTranslate: All JSON keys have already been translated.
error.noTranslations: You have not created any translations yet.
error.imageTooLarge: The resolution of the image is already too high for further processing.
error.modelRequiresSubscription: This model requires an active Patreon subscription.

regionSelector.selectRegionHint: Select a region from the canvas to edit
regionSelector.applyAsTileHint: Place the edited image as a new tile on the scene
regionSelector.noRegionSelected: No region selected. Use 'Select Region' first to capture a scene area.
regionSelector.sceneChanged: The original scene is no longer active. Please select a new region.
regionSelector.tileCreated: Tile created successfully at the original region position.
regionSelector.tileCreationFailed: Failed to create the tile. Please try again.

tokenhorde.title: Token-Revolver
tokenhorde.description: Use your created images to create a token revolver. A token revolver is an (unlinked) actor that receives a random token when dragged and dropped onto the canvas. This makes it easy to place groups of robbers, for example, without having them all look the same.
tokenhorde.tokenChose: Choose the variants for the token
tokenhorde.requiresTokenizer: This function requires the VTTA-Tokenizer module.
tokenhorde.saveAsTokenHordeHint: Create a wildcard token with multiple random appearances
tokenhorde.prefixhint: A suffix that is added to the filenames to group the images.
tokenhorde.outFolderHint: The finished tokens will be saved here
tokenhorde.autotokenhint: Automatically applies the default token ring from VTTA-Tokenizer to the image
tokenhorde.finishHorde: The token is converted into a wildcard token and all placed tokens in the current scene are replaced.

boobastudio.searchAndReplaceWarning:
Warning

This function is only suitable for experienced users. The function Inpaint/Replace is recommended instead.
boobastudio.countHint: Generate multiple variants at once. Note that the mana costs are multiplied by the amount.
boobastudio.promptbuilder: Generate prompts for a set of images, e.g., a group of rogues
boobastudio.promptbuilderhint:
Instruction for generating a group of prompts
Example: human, dwarven, and elven medieval zombies
boobastudio.promptImprovise: What would you like to change?
boobastudio.improvisePromptHint: Tell the AI how to adjust your image prompt. It will rewrite the prompt based on your instructions.

namegen.title: Names
namegen.description: Give your unlinked tokens their own unique names using AI generation.
namegen.hint: Use the prompt field to provide context like culture, profession, or setting. The AI will generate fitting names for each token.
namegen.no_groups_hint: Place unlinked tokens on the current scene to generate names for them.
namegen.no_groups_help: Tip: Unlinked tokens are duplicates that don't share data with their source actor. They're perfect for NPCs and enemies.
namegen.generateAll: Generate names for all tokens in this group
namegen.saveName: Save this name to the token
namegen.promptplaceholder: E.g. medieval German, street thieves, fantasy elves, Japanese names...
namegen.promptTooltip: Describe the naming style, culture, or context. Leave empty to use the actor name as context.
namegen.genderTooltip: Select which genders to include when generating names

tooltip.chatbubble: Shows a chat bubble on the token and focuses the viewport on the token
tooltip.playAtPosition: Play the sound only within the radius around the token
tooltip.pickFromScene: Convert the current scene into an image and edit it. This way you can use the canvas drawing options from Foundry for preparation.
tooltip.saveAsResult: Save as... and assign to the element
tooltip.enhancePrompt: Improve the prompt with AI (English, more understandable for AI)
tooltip.takePlaceholder: Take over the description. Be careful not to overload the prompt with too many trivial details. This can lead to unwanted results.
tooltip.copyUrl: Save image locally and copy URL. Then paste it into an item, for example.
tooltip.deletePrediction: Permanently delete element, local copies remain.

musicgen.customrate: This voice costs 2x as much mana.
musicgen.favoritesEmpty: Star a voice to add it to your favorites.
musicgen.ttsdescription: Convert text to speech, e.g., for a narrator voice.
musicgen.title: Generate audio
musicgen.description: Create a short song and the corresponding lyrics.
musicgen.lyricshint: Enter your own lyrics or describe a song.
musicgen.stylehint: Choose the style of music... e.g. mystical, epic, sad, joyful, etc.
musicgen.instrumentalhint: Create an instrumental piece without lyrics.
musicgen.saveToPlaylist: Add to playlist, you can then drag and drop the song between playlists.
musicgen.previewNote: Only you can hear the preview. Add the song to a playlist to make it audible for everyone.
musicgen.createLyricsHint: Interprets your input and automatically generates lyrics for the song. Disable to take over your own lyrics exactly.
musicgen.generateLyricsHint: Let the AI write full lyrics from a theme or description.
musicgen.timeHint: Generating a song can take a little while — usually around a minute. Please be patient.
musicgen.lengthHint: Length of the generated track in seconds. Longer songs cost more mana.
musicgen.seedhint: Optional - reuse a number to reproduce a result
musicgen.playlistSaved: Song {name} has been added to the playlist {playlist}.
musicgen.ttsLongHint: Tip: For long narration, consider splitting into multiple shorter prompts for easier edits and lower redo costs.

fieldsPlaceholder.forground_prompt: Describe the object in the foreground to help the AI recognize the element and prevent it from blending with the background.
fieldsPlaceholder.background_prompt: Describe what you want to see in the background of the image. This could be a description of the desired background scene or lighting.

modeldescription.stable-fast-3d: Warning! This model generates GLB 3D models from an existing image. This feature is currently more of a proof-of-concept. Note that generated 3D models can only be saved and will not be automatically fitted anywhere.

boobastudio.drawingTypeHint: The type of image sets basic conditions for how the image is generated. This includes, for example, the background, the view, and similar aspects. Note that the name of the element is also evaluated for this purpose.
boobastudio.modelHint: The model has a significant impact on prompt understanding, the quality, and accuracy of the image.

AiBrowser.title: Gallery
AiBrowser.description: Here you will find all the content you generated. You can edit, delete, or download them.
AiBrowser.requiresPatreon: Gallery access requires an active Patreon subscription.

packs.title: Packs
packs.titleHint: Curated image collections grouped by theme and style
packs.description: Browse curated image packs organized by theme. Click a pack to see all its images.
packs.searchHint: Search by pack name or theme
packs.filterGalleryHint: Show only this pack's images in the gallery tab
packs.generateInStyleHint: Open the image generator pre-filled with this pack's style settings
packs.generateInStyleContribHint: Generate an image in this pack's style — you can contribute it to the pack
packs.useForTokensHint: Load all pack images into the Token Revolver for wildcard tokens
packs.addToPackHint: Add this image to one of your packs
packs.createNewPackHint: Create a new pack starting with this image
packs.noPacksHint: Check back soon — new packs are added regularly
packs.loadMoreHint: Show additional packs in this category
packs.myPacksHint: Packs you created or are managing
packs.clearFilterHint: Remove the pack filter and show all images
packs.fromPackHint: Choose a pack to load all its images as token variants
packs.featuredHint: Highlighted packs recommended by the community

editor.name: Name
editor.selectImages: Select images to add to this pack:
editor.noImages: No images yet. Add images from your creations.
editor.noCreations: You don't have any creations yet
editor.saveFirst: Save the pack first before adding images
editor.needMoreImages: Pack needs at least 5 images to submit
editor.confirmDeleteMsg: This will permanently delete the pack and cannot be undone.
editor.noPacksYet: You haven't created any packs yet
editor.noPacksYetHint: Create your first pack to start curating themed image collections
editor.generateBannerHint: AI will create a banner based on your pack's name, description, and style settings.
editor.bannerTimeout: Banner generation is taking longer than expected. Check back later.
editor.rejectedTitle: This pack was returned for changes
editor.rejectedHint: Update your pack based on the feedback above, then re-submit for review.

boobastudio.formatHint: Choose the format of the image. High resolutions require more mana.
boobastudio.accountcreation:
To use BoobaStudio, you need an account. For content creation, data is sent to a server that processes and returns it - this involves costs and identification. Here's how to create your account:

  1. Become a member on Patreon: BoobaStudio Patreon
  2. Log in with your Patreon account on BoobaStudio.
  3. Copy your API key.
  4. Paste the API key here.

Also note that you need an internet connection. Once that is done, you can use all the features of BoobaStudio.

upscalers.stability-ai/creative: Scale images up to 4K resolution. Achieve a redesign of the result through your input. Very expensive and recommended only for high-quality images.
upscalers.stability-ai/conservative: Scale images up to 4K resolution. Changes to the image are minimal. Very expensive and recommended only for high-quality images.
upscalers.canPrompt: Describe the image and provide additional information about what will be added when upscaling.
upscalers.upscale: Basic upscaler. Cheap and decent results.

grudge.title: Report feedback/error
grudge.discord: Discuss with us and the community on Discord
grudge.patreon: Send us a message on Patreon
grudge.description: Please dont hesitate to report any issues or feedback. This will help to improve the module and make it better for everyone. If you have any suggestions or ideas, feel free to share them as well.

AiRandomGen.title: Create Description
AiRandomGen.description: Create a description for this object. Be as specific as possible in your requirements to achieve the best result.

AiSceneGen.description: Generate a scene with AI-generated content. Be as precise as possible in the description to achieve the best result.
AiSceneGen.upscaleDescription: Choose an AI model for upscaling (improving the resolution) of the current image. The result can vary greatly and uses different amounts of mana and time.
AiSceneGen.title: Generate scene
AiSceneGen.upscaleResolutionHint: The resolution to which the image should be scaled. The image must be scaled in a separate step. Further upscaling may not be possible later. This requires some mana.
AiSceneGen.upscaleHint: Upscaling - Increases the resolution of the image. This requires some mana.

boobastudio.hdhint:
High-resolution images require more mana.
Recommendation: Try upscaling only after generating good results instead.
boobastudio.temperatureHint: Controls the creativity of the generated content. Lower values (e.g., 0.2) produce more predictable and focused results, while higher values (e.g., 0.8) produce more creative and variable outputs.

iterativeGen.promptPlaceholder: Describe what you want to generate or how to refine the previous result...
iterativeGen.textInserted: Text has been inserted into the editor.

bgremovers.lucataco/removebg: Very low mana cost. Basic capabilities. Good enough for most cases.
bgremovers.men1scus/birefnet: Very low mana cost. Basic capabilities. Good enough for most cases.
bgremovers.cjwbw/rembg: Low mana cost. Basic capabilities. Good enough for most cases.

boobastudio.removebgmodelHint: Algorithm for removing the background. Can lead to different results.
boobastudio.sketch: The existing image is used as a sketch for the generation.
boobastudio.drawingStyleHint: The drawing style determines how the image is drawn.
boobastudio.NoUploadPermission: No permission to upload images or edit the element. Please contact the game master for permission.

toolbar.selectRectHint: Draw a rectangle to select an area for editing
toolbar.brushSelectHint: Paint to select areas for editing
toolbar.panHint: Click and drag to move around the canvas

toolbar.downloadHint: Download the current image to your computer
toolbar.generateHint: Generate a new image from text description
toolbar.cropHint: Crop the image to a custom size
toolbar.outpaintHint: Expand the image beyond its borders with AI
toolbar.upscaleHint: Increase image resolution with AI enhancement
toolbar.editHint: Edit the image with AI — add style, structure or elements from references
toolbar.editProHint: Edit the image with AI Pro — higher quality editing with references
toolbar.editPromptHint: Edit the image with a text prompt
toolbar.inpaintHint: Inpaint with mask — select an area and replace it
toolbar.eraseHint: Delete with mask — select an area and remove it
toolbar.styleHint: Apply artistic style transformations to the image
toolbar.removeBgHint: Remove the background from the image

canvas.editPromptSelection: Edit the selected area with a text prompt
canvas.inpaintSelection: Inpaint the selected area with a mask
canvas.eraseSelection: Erase the selected area with a mask
canvas.describeChanges: Describe what should appear in the selected area...

boobastudio.defineProperties: The prompt for the generation can be pre-filled with the content of this attribute. Please select the one that describes the object.
boobastudio.behaviorHint: Influence the generation with the right context.

onboarding.title: Welcome to BoobaStudio
onboarding.intro: BoobaStudio adds AI-powered tools to Foundry. Here is a quick overview of what you can do.

modes.demonaiBody: Use a provider endpoint and credentials that you control.
modes.clientOnlyBody: Uses a locally stored OpenAI API key and sends requests directly from your Foundry client.

onboarding.noEmptyHotbarSlot: No empty macro hotbar slot found. Please drag the BoobaStudio radial menu macro to an empty slot manually.
onboarding.macroCreateFailed: Could not create the BoobaStudio radial menu macro. Please ask a GM to create it (or create it manually).
onboarding.macroAssignFailed: Could not place the BoobaStudio radial menu macro on your hotbar.

welcome.title: Welcome to BoobaStudio
welcome.tagline: AI-powered tools for your tabletop adventures

disclaimer.title: Important Notice
disclaimer.ai: This module uses Artificial Intelligence (AI) to generate content.
disclaimer.external: Features communicate with external API servers outside of Foundry VTT.
disclaimer.subscription: No hosted subscription is required. Configure a provider endpoint that you control.

text.title: Text Generation
text.desc: Generate NPC descriptions, item lore, journal entries and more with AI assistance.

images.title: Image Generation
images.desc: Create stunning illustrations, character portraits, and item art on demand.

scenes.title: Scene Generation
scenes.desc: Generate beautiful scene backgrounds, battlemaps, and environmental art.

tokens.title: Token Art
tokens.desc: Generate and apply custom token artwork to your actors automatically.

translation.title: Translation
translation.desc: Translate content between languages - single items or entire compendiums.

threads.title: AI Threads
threads.desc: Persistent GPT conversations stored in journals for ongoing AI chats.

tts.title: TTS & Audio
tts.desc: Text-to-speech narration and audio generation for immersive gameplay.

walls.title: Wall Detection
walls.desc: Automatically detect and place walls from your map images.

gallery.title: Gallery Browser
gallery.desc: Browse, manage, and reuse all your generated images and content.

namegen.title: Name Generation
namegen.desc: Generate culturally appropriate character and place names for your world.

speakingTokens.title: Speaking Tokens
speakingTokens.desc: Give voice to your tokens with text-to-speech powered by AI voices.

localization.title: Localization
localization.desc: Translate module and system UI files into your preferred language.

findCibola.title: Look for This Icon
findCibola.desc: Wherever you see the BoobaStudio icon, AI-powered features are just a click away. It appears throughout Foundry VTT to give you quick access to generation tools.
findCibola.contextMenu: Header bar options on items, journals, actors, and scenes include AI features
findCibola.editorToolbar: Text editor toolbars include BoobaStudio AI writing tools
findCibola.sceneControls: Scene controls offer AI-powered wall detection and more

modes.localDesc: Use OpenAI, OpenRouter, Ollama, LM Studio, or another OpenAI-compatible endpoint directly from this Foundry client.
modes.compatibilityDesc: Existing local text, image, document, history, and Foundry integration workflows remain available. Provider support varies by workflow.

welcome.wallsHint: Wall detection is available via the scene context menu. Right-click a scene to access it.
welcome.dragToHotbarHint: Drag this to your hotbar to create a macro that opens the Cibola 8 radial menu. Click the macro to access all AI features quickly.
welcome.openAppHint: Open app.cibola.world to manage your account, view usage, and access additional features.

hints.text: Use the Cibola icon in the editor toolbar to generate text with AI. You can also right-click on selected text for more AI options.
hints.threads: Threads are persistent AI conversations stored in journals. Create additional Thread pages in any Journal Entry using the page type dropdown.
hints.scenesNoScene: Please activate a scene first to use the Scene Generator. Open the Scenes sidebar and click a scene to activate it.
hints.wallsNoScene: Activate a scene to use Wall Detection live. The documentation is shown for reference.
hints.speakingTokens: Select a token on the canvas, then use the Cibola icon on its Token HUD to configure AI voices and trigger speech.
hints.tokensPick: Select an actor to open the AI generator for:
hints.tokensNew: Or create a new actor with AI-generated content.
